title: Migrate addon.checkout.ts to qzpay path (Phase E)

tasks.title: Write failing regression tests for the dual-resolve planId bug (both sites)
tasks.description: In apps/api/test/services/addon.checkout.test.ts, add regression tests that reproduce the live bug with a UUID planId (post-SPEC-168): (1) createAddonCheckout category gate (addon.checkout.ts:233) — an addon with targetCategories must be REJECTED for a customer whose plan category is excluded, even when activeSubscription.planId is a UUID (today the gate is silently skipped); (2) confirmAddonPurchase limit baseline (addon.checkout.ts:505) — limit adjustments must use the plan's baseline limit, not previousValue=0, when planId is a UUID. Tests MUST fail against current code (bug-fix policy: regression test first). Unit tests only; use the existing fixtures. Run: pnpm --filter @repo/api test -- addon.checkout (targeted).

subtasks.title: Failing test: UUID planId skips targetCategories gate
Failing test: UUID planId computes limit adjustments from 0

tasks.title: Implement dual-resolve via PlanService at both ALL_PLANS sites
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/services/addon.checkout.ts, add a module-level dual-resolve helper following resolvePlanByIdOrSlug from apps/api/src/services/addon-plan-change.service.ts:66 (PlanService.getById → getBySlug fallback, returns null when neither resolves). Apply it at the line-233 category gate (createAddonCheckout) and the line-505 limit baseline (confirmAddonPurchase), removing both ALL_PLANS.find calls. Update the line-538 test ('should still succeed when the subscription planId is not found in ALL_PLANS') deliberately: with dual-resolve a truly-unknown planId still soft-skips (plan null), but UUID planIds now resolve — assert the new behavior. T-001 regression tests must pass. Keep ServiceResult error shapes unchanged.

subtasks.title: Update line-538 silent-skip test for fixed behavior

tasks.title: Cut over catalog reads to AddonCatalogService.getBySlug
tasks.description: Absorbed SPEC-192 deferred cutover (see .qtm/specs/SPEC-192-billing-catalog-to-db/docs/deferred-checkout-cutover.md). In apps/api/src/services/addon.checkout.ts replace getAddonBySlug(input.addonSlug) with AddonCatalogService.getBySlug() at BOTH entry points (createAddonCheckout ~line 177, confirmAddonPurchase ~line 469). Dual-resolve NOT needed here — checkout input is always a slug. AddonCatalogService lives at packages/service-core/src/services/billing/addon/addon-catalog.service.ts. Update catalog mocks in addon.checkout.test.ts from @repo/billing's getAddonBySlug to the service. Handle the service's Result<T> shape (vs the config function's direct return) — map NOT_FOUND to the existing error responses.

tasks.title: Add catalog-cutover parity regression test
tasks.description: Add a parity regression test mirroring the SPEC-192 FR-2 cutover tests, pattern: apps/api/test/routes/billing/admin/hooks/qzpay-admin-hooks.cutover.test.ts. The test asserts addon.checkout resolves addons through AddonCatalogService (DB-backed) and NOT through the @repo/billing config catalog — guard against regression to config reads. Place it alongside the existing cutover tests or in apps/api/test/services/ following the established naming (addon.checkout.cutover.test.ts).

subtasks.title: Parity test: catalog reads go through AddonCatalogService

tasks.title: Drop @repo/billing catalog imports from addon.checkout.ts
tasks.description: After T-002 (ALL_PLANS gone) and T-003 (getAddonBySlug gone), remove the import { ALL_PLANS, getAddonBySlug } from '@repo/billing' line from apps/api/src/services/addon.checkout.ts entirely. Grep-verify no other @repo/billing catalog symbol remains in the file. Typecheck apps/api. [NOTE: became a verification no-op — T-003 removed the entire import line; grep-verified clean 2026-06-04]

tasks.title: Migrate createAddonCheckout to billing.checkout.create()
tasks.description: Core migration (FR-1) in apps/api/src/services/addon.checkout.ts. Replace createMercadoPagoPreference with billing.checkout.create() using the exact target shape in spec.md §Implementation details (verified against QZPayCreateCheckoutInput): mode 'payment'; lineItems[0] = { unitAmount: finalPrice (CENTAVOS — do NOT pre-divide; the MP adapter divides by 100), currency 'ARS', quantity 1, title: addon.name, description: addon.description, categoryId: 'services' }; successUrl/cancelUrl as today; customerId/customerEmail; customerName from customer.metadata.name when present (extractPayerInfo and MercadoPagoPayerInfo and MP_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID are removed — the adapter covers the splitting and email local-part fallback); notificationUrl; idempotencyKey: checkoutUuid; statementDescriptor from env; expiresInMinutes: 30; metadata = existing dual-format keys + order_id: orderId. checkoutUrl = result.providerInitPoint ?? result.providerSandboxInitPoint (intentional behavior change from sandbox-first — note for PR description). Remove the mercadopago imports and the env.HOSPEDA_MERCADO_PAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN guard if the qzpay billing instance owns credentials (verify how subscription-checkout.service.ts handles it). Keep orderId generation and the PurchaseAddonResult contract unchanged. [NOTE: source change left uncommitted by design — commits together with T-007 test migration. Also removed mercadopago from package.json (T-008 partial).]

subtasks.title: Add order_id to metadata; keep dual-format keys
Remove mercadopago imports from the file

tasks.title: Migrate addon.checkout.test.ts mocks to billing.checkout.create
tasks.description: FR-6: in apps/api/test/services/addon.checkout.test.ts remove vi.mock('mercadopago', ...) and mockPreferenceCreate; mock billing.checkout.create on the qzpay billing fixture instead (resolve { id, providerInitPoint, providerSandboxInitPoint, ... }). Re-target all 32 existing assertions to the create-input shape: payer via customerEmail/customerName (the explicit first_name/last_name split and email local-part fallback tests now assert what hospeda PASSES to qzpay, not the final MP payer block — the adapter owns that logic and tests it in its own repo), lineItems[0].unitAmount in centavos (no /100), idempotencyKey, statementDescriptor, expiresInMinutes, metadata keys incl. order_id, providerInitPoint-based checkoutUrl, CHECKOUT_ERROR when both init points are missing. All 32 tests + T-001 regressions green.

subtasks.title: Remove mercadopago SDK mock and helpers

tasks.title: Remove mercadopago from apps/api dependencies
tasks.description: FR-2: grep apps/api (src AND test, including type-only subpath imports like mercadopago/dist/...) to confirm addon.checkout.ts was the last importer. Remove 'mercadopago' from apps/api/package.json dependencies, run pnpm install to update the lockfile, typecheck apps/api. If any unexpected importer appears, STOP and report instead of removing.

subtasks.title: Grep verify no remaining importer (src + test + subpaths)

tasks.title: Update extractAddonFromReference fallback for new external_reference semantics
tasks.description: Post-migration, MP external_reference is the qzpay checkout-session UUID (qzpay core sets session.id; not caller-configurable), no longer addon_<slug>_<uuid>. In apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/payment-logic.ts (~line 598) the warn-only extractAddonFromReference fallback stops matching new payments. Update it: keep matching legacy in-flight references (created pre-deploy) AND extend the warn log to surface metadata.order_id when present so operators can still trace. Do NOT change the metadata-based confirmation path (extractAddonMetadata at line 595). Update/add unit tests for the fallback behavior (legacy reference still warns; qzpay UUID reference without metadata warns with order_id context when available).

subtasks.title: Unit tests for legacy and new reference shapes

tasks.title: Schedule one_time_payment polling job from addon checkout
tasks.description: FR-5a: after a successful billing.checkout.create() in createAddonCheckout, schedule a polling job mirroring the annual flow (schedulePollingForSubscription in apps/api/src/services/subscription-checkout.service.ts — extract/generalize the helper or add an addon-flavored sibling): resourceType 'one_time_payment', providerResourceId = checkout session id (result.id), subscriptionId = activeSubscription.id (addon purchase guarantees an active sub), metadata { type: 'addon_purchase', addonSlug, customerId, userId, orderId }. Scheduling failure must be non-fatal (log + continue — same convention as the annual flow if it logs; verify). Unit tests: job scheduled with correct shape on success; checkout still succeeds if scheduling throws.

subtasks.title: Schedule job with addon metadata after checkout create

tasks.title: Dispatch addon confirmations in runOneTimePaymentPoll
tasks.description: FR-5b: in apps/api/src/cron/jobs/subscription-poll.job.ts, runOneTimePaymentPoll (line ~197) hard-codes confirmAnnualSubscription for succeeded payments. Add an addon branch: when the job's metadata (or the matched payment's metadata) carries type 'addon_purchase' / addonSlug, confirm via the same idempotent path the webhook uses (confirmAddonPurchase through the billing + entitlement service wiring used by processPaymentUpdated — reuse, don't duplicate). The billingAddonPurchases.paymentId idempotency check already covers webhook/polling races. Annual jobs keep the existing branch (metadata.annualSubscriptionId / job fallback). Unit tests: addon job dispatches to addon confirmation; annual job unchanged; ambiguous/missing metadata logs and keeps the annual fallback behavior.

subtasks.title: Wire idempotent addon confirmation (reuse webhook path)
Unit tests for both dispatch branches

tasks.title: Post-cutover mock sweep across the repo
tasks.description: Mandatory sweep (SPEC-192 paid 3 CI rounds for skipping it): grep ALL test files that vi.mock the touched modules — 'mercadopago', '@repo/billing' (catalog symbols), '../services/addon.checkout' / 'addon.checkout', 'subscription-poll', 'payment-logic'. Enumerated vi.mock factories break silently when the mocked module's export surface changes. Fix every stale factory. Run the affected test files individually (targeted vitest, NO full suite per owner constraint). List swept files in the task completion notes.

subtasks.title: Grep all vi.mock sites of touched modules

tasks.title: Quality gate: typecheck + lint + targeted test runs
tasks.description: Run per-package typecheck on every touched package (apps/api at minimum; packages/service-core if touched), pnpm lint (biome), and the targeted test files for addon.checkout, the cutover parity test, payment-logic fallback, and subscription-poll. NO full local suite, NO parallel heavy runs (owner constraint — sequential, targeted). All green before PR.

tasks.title: Register deferred smoke sections + cutover sign-off docs
tasks.description: Add SPEC-127's deferred staging-smoke sections (at minimum §1.7 addon purchase — billing CORE; review the SPEC-143 checklist for any other section this change exercises, e.g. webhook/polling sections) to .qtm/specs/SPEC-193-billing-go-live-readiness-master/docs/pending-staging-smoke.md following the list's existing entry format. File the deferral sign-off in .qtm/specs/SPEC-192-billing-catalog-to-db/docs/deferred-checkout-cutover.md (cutover absorbed by SPEC-127, PR ref, date). Commit .qtm tracking separately from code (jq → biome format 4-space where JSON).

subtasks.title: Append smoke sections to SPEC-193 pending list

tasks.title: Open PR to staging and merge on green CI
tasks.description: Before pushing: gh pr list --head spec/SPEC-127-migrate-addon-checkout-to-qzpay --state all (orphan-commit guard). Open PR targeting staging. PR description MUST note: (1) sandbox→prod init-point preference change, (2) external_reference now qzpay session UUID + order_id in metadata, (3) dual-resolve bugfix at both sites, (4) absorbed SPEC-192 catalog cutover, (5) addon polling fallback, (6) smoke deferred to SPEC-193 batch with link to pending list entry. Merge ONLY via gh pr merge --merge after CI fully green (gh pr view N --json statusCheckRollup). Never --admin. After merge: update spec status to completed in both indexes (index-sync) + engram session summary.

subtasks.title: Orphan-commit guard + push + PR with behavior notes
